home.featuredWorkInfoBody: Enjoy a random selection of images from the club's history. Click any image to view the album it belongs to.
home.missionBanner: CU Photo Club is Chulalongkorn University's photography society — open to every student, camera or no experience required.
home.missionBody: Founded in 1967, we're a student-run photography club documenting campus life, culture, and the city around us — weekly meetups, workshops, and an archive that keeps growing.
home.statsLead: A student photography club at Chulalongkorn University, running since 1967.
home.introLead: We're just a bunch of students who really like cameras.
home.introBody: Since 1967 we've been meeting up, teaching each other, and shooting everything from campus life to street corners of Bangkok — no experience needed, just curiosity.
home.metaDescription: The official photography club of Chulalongkorn University — documenting life, culture, and the human condition since 1967.
home.constructionBody: Some pages and content may still be incomplete. Thanks for stopping by to see the club's work while we rebuild the site.

hero.lead: The official photography club of Chulalongkorn University — 3rd Floor, Chulachakrabongse Building, Phaya Thai Road, Wang Mai, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330.

history.quote: Every photograph we make is a letter to the future.
body: Founded in 1967 by a small group of Chulalongkorn University students with borrowed cameras and a shared obsession with the image, the CU Photo Club has grown into one of Thailand's most respected student photography organisations.
Over five decades, we have documented student life, cultural shifts, and the evolving cityscape of Bangkok — building an archive that is both personal record and historical testimony.

about.body: CU Photo Club is open to all students of Chulalongkorn University regardless of experience level. We run workshops, Photo Camp, 1 Day Trip photo outings, annual exhibitions, and maintain an active archive of visual work from across the decades. If you have curiosity and a camera, you belong here.

footer.tagline:
Official photography club of
Chulalongkorn University, Bangkok, Thailand

albums.pageLead: Every album is a complete body of work — a morning, a place, a single roll of an idea pursued to its end. Browse the collections our members have made.

adminCost.title: Storage & Cost
adminCost.lead: Live R2 object-storage usage for this site, with a monthly cost estimate. Bandwidth (egress) is free on R2, so storage is the only real cost.
adminCost.cachedNote: Cached up to 5 min — refresh for live figures
adminCost.empty: No objects in the bucket yet.
adminCost.largestLead: The 10 biggest files — worth checking these are compressed.
adminCost.projectionsLead: Estimated monthly storage cost as the archive grows. Egress stays free at every size.
adminCost.freeTierLine: Free tier, per month: {storage} GB storage · {classA} Class A ops · {classB} Class B ops
adminCost.opsNote: Operation counts (reads/writes) aren't shown here — they require Cloudflare dashboard analytics and stay well within the free tier at this scale.
